titleStmt.title: SII 15.30: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 30. (B.K. No. 7 of 1929-30.) BĒLŪR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the Śiva temple.

This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Pushya śu. 13, Sunday, Uttarāyana-saṁkramaṇa. The cyclic year cited seems to be a mistake for Krōdhana. The date is irregular in other respects also. The above tithi may be equated with 1145 A.D., December 28, Friday. The Saṅkramaṇa took place three days earlier.

The inscription registers a gift of land and other incomes made by the Eight Hiṭṭus, Prabhu Rēvarasa and others to the teacher [Śū]draka-jīya for worship and offerings to the god Mūlasthāna of Bēlūr in Hagaraṭṭage-nāḍu, when Hiriya Heggaḍe Handeya-Nāyaka, the Mahāpasāyita and Sarvādhikāri of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Hemmāḍi of the Yādava lineage and Sēvuṇa family, was governing Hagaraṭṭage Three Hundred. The record contains a large number of scribal errors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāma
racāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . sva
sti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī maThe letter śrī is written inversely.
jagadēkamalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōtarā bhi vṛThe letters ta and rā are engraved in smaller siśe.
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇapu
rada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkhatāvinōdadi rājyaṁ
geyutamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti sa
madhigatepaṁcāmahāsabuda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvā
rāvatīpuravaradhīsvaraṁ visamahayagajaruḍapravu
ḍarēkhārēvaṁta yanēkaśastra sāstrapārāvārāparāyaṇa
maṁḍaḷikanārāyaṇa yādavakulakumudinīniśākara satyaratnā
kara nīticāṇakyanamōghavākya śaṁkacakragadādhara sakaḷakaḷādha
rasidhu sēvuṇānvayaprasūta lōkavikhyāta cakravartti
ya sēnāsubhaṭa gōṣṭīprasaṁsa vibudhajanamanōpadminī
rājahaṁsa ripumaṁḍaḷikasarabhabhēruṁḍa nereveḍegaṁḍa daṁḍamani
ṟivaṁ gōmanasiṁga śrīmajagadēkamalladēvara kaṭṭidalagu kumaraṁ ma
hāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ hammāḍidēvarasara mahāpasāyataṁ sarvvādhikā
ri hiriya heggaḍe haṁdeya nāyakaṁ hagaliṭṭage 300 maṁ tribhōgābhyantaradinā
ḷuttavira mṭa 8 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada pusya suddha 13 Ādivāra muttarāya
ṇa saṁkramaṇanimitamāgi hagaraṭṭage nāḍa baḷiya bāḍa bēlūra mū
lastānadēvargge yaṁgabhōga nivēdyakkaṁ Eṁṭu hiṭu prabhu hiriyarēvarasa mu
kyavāgi ddhārapurbbakaṁ māḍi sudhraka jīyargge koṭa mataru 6 nāvidigeyaThe letter ya is written below jī in smaller siśe.
dāriyiṁ teṁkalu matteyuṁ teṁka haḷḷa mēre bāviya taḍiya brahmēsva
radēvāra keya sarbbanamasya matta nārāyaṇadēvara
keyimalekuguḍeya dāriṁ muḍalu Ūroḍeyara tōṭadiṁ baḍagalu
beṟekāla kameyanāyakana vebakava mulattana dēvaṁge biṭṭa mataru
12 Āṁgabhōga nivēdyake Āṟu mattarige Āruvaṇa paṇa 1 dēvamana koṭa
li mana 1 khaṁḍali mana 1 nivēsaṇa keĪ Īpatoṁdhu heḍagege baḍu
da baḍu keĪ 2 bamana Upu hēṟiṁge Ele 100 hotaḷake Āvātu haḍake
solagi sadataṁ paradataṁ Ā yavōti vasuṁdhara seṭṭivarisa sahasraṇi Īṭṭa
yaṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
